commanders.name: Alicia
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to increase the damage dealt by the ship in the next slot of the formation by 30%.

commanders.name: Angla
commanders.skillDescription: Reduces hospital time and prevents anyone from killing the Commander.

commanders.name: Donna
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to restore 15% of maximum Shields at the start of each round.

commanders.name: Essido
commanders.skillDescription: Increases the damage of Ship-based Weapons.

commanders.name: Heloyce
commanders.skillDescription: Removes the formation penalty when a fleet is under attack and increases fleet stability.

commanders.name: Jason
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to prevent modules from consuming He3 while attacking or defending.

commanders.name: Jerome
commanders.skillDescription: If attacked, the enemy will receive 10% more damage the next round (stackable).

commanders.name: Kelly
commanders.skillDescription: Restores 15% of maximum Structures per round.

commanders.name: Lawrence
commanders.skillDescription: Increases the damage of ballistic weapons.

commanders.name: Maxius
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to increase the accuracy of all friendly forces within 4 spaces by 5.

commanders.name: Motima
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to use the highest possible hit chance when attacking the enemy.

commanders.name: Panis
commanders.skillDescription: Increases the chance of air interception.

commanders.name: Rayllf
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to increase ship defense by 5 per round. This effect lasts for 1 round.

commanders.name: Shaba
commanders.skillDescription: Increases the dodge chance of friendly forces within 4 spaces by 5 (stackable).

commanders.name: Sofia
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to move an extra 3 spaces.

commanders.name: Taude
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to deal Lucky Shot, which increases the chance of shooting down a target by 50%.

commanders.name: Tyren
commanders.skillDescription: Increases the damage of missiles.

commanders.name: Vinna
commanders.skillDescription: Reduces level-up requirements by 30%. Also has a chance to increase one stat by 10 when an attack connects. This effect lasts until the end of combat.

commanders.name: Wayne
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to deal double damage to the enemy.

commanders.name: Anna
commanders.skillDescription: Attacks have a chance to deal an extra 40% Piercing damage.

commanders.name: Annata
commanders.skillDescription: Increases the Shields and Structures of friendly forces within 4 steps by 8% after each round.

commanders.name: Evi
commanders.skillDescription: Increases the damage of Directional Weapons.

commanders.name: Gastaf
commanders.skillDescription: Has an increased chance to deal critical strikes.

commanders.name: Leo
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to reduce the Durability, Structures and Shields of enemies within 2 steps by 5% after every turn.

commanders.name: Linda
commanders.skillDescription: Attacks have a chance to deal an extra 50% Scattering damage.

commanders.name: Nick
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to avoid damage.

commanders.name: Penni
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to deal triple damage when attacking, but also inflicts 10% damage to the ship.

commanders.name: Ringel
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to inflict an additional 30% of the damage last dealt to the enemy when the next round begins.

commanders.name: Sylva
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to deal up to 2.5 times the damage to a fortress.

commanders.name: Sylla
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to reduce damage taken by 15% and enables all ships to share damage.

commanders.name: Todd
commanders.skillDescription: While attacking, there is a chance of attacking the target twice.

commanders.name: Bart
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to dodge attacks and increase Attack Power by 15% for one round.

commanders.name: Callisto
commanders.skillDescription: While attacking, has a chance to increase attack strength by 10%. Can be stacked and remains in effect until end of the battle.

commanders.name: Carlos
commanders.skillDescription: Deals additional damage to enemy fleet ship structures. Actual amounts are based on the amount of damage dealt to enemy ship shields.

commanders.name: Cassius
commanders.skillDescription: When attacking, Cassius has a chance to move the enemy fleet back 3 spaces. Can only be used once per turn.

commanders.name: Circe
commanders.skillDescription: While defending against an attack, has a chance to prevent the enemy commander from using skills in the next Round.

commanders.name: Dilira
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to fully restore Shields and Durability.

commanders.name: Hellen
commanders.skillDescription: When attacking, there is a chance to instantly finish reloading weapons.

commanders.name: Maletiz
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to absorb all damage and reflect it back to the attacker.

commanders.name: Medusa
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to cause the enemy fleet to skip its next Round when Medusa is attacked.

commanders.name: Nora
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to destroy enemy troops when they attack. This effect can only be initiated once per round.

commanders.name: Sandora
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to deal 30% Scattering damage to all enemy forces.

commanders.name: Stani
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to prevent the enemy from moving and attacking for the next round.

commanders.name: Venus
commanders.skillDescription: Increases damage negation of all shield modules in the fleet.

commanders.name: Carbuncle Cohort
commanders.skillDescription: Will reflect 20% of the original damage taken, and then further reduce damage taken by 15%, and finally spread the remaining damage equally across all ships in the fleet.

commanders.name: Deadly Duo
commanders.skillDescription: This skill has a chance to deal an additional 50% Scattering Damage and 40% Piercing damage during all attacks.

commanders.name: Desolate Prayers
commanders.skillDescription: This skill has the chance to lower all 4 stats of an enemy commander to 0. The target will also be immobilized in the next round.

commanders.name: Enduring Chorus
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance each round to fully restore all Shield and Structure points and increase the Dodge attribute of all friendly forces within 4 spaces by 5. This buff can be stacked.

commanders.name: Ererbus Errants
commanders.skillDescription: Each time Erebus Errants levels up, the total value of their 4 attributes will increase by an additional 5 points. Also has a chance to negate all damage when attacked.

commanders.name: Fearmongers
commanders.skillDescription: While attacking or defending, has a chance to increase enemy He3 cost by 5 times and reduce enemy attack power by 50% until end of next round.

commanders.name: Feral Raptors
commanders.skillDescription: Chance to deal 6x damage while attacking but also reflects 10% of damage back to your ships.

commanders.name: Frontline Surge
commanders.skillDescription: This skill has a chance to move fleets an additional 3 spaces and increase attack values by 10% for every space that fleet moves.

commanders.name: Hekatian Witnesses
commanders.skillDescription: Each time level up, the total increment of four attributes is increased by an additional 5 points. Have a chance to destroy an entire ship stack each time it is dealt damage.

commanders.name: Homeric Hellions
commanders.skillDescription: Each time level up, the total increment of four attributes is increased by an additional 5 points.

commanders.name: Impending Doom
commanders.skillDescription: This skill increases the dodge rate of your ships and, if attacked, will deal 10% more damage the next round (stackable).

commanders.name: Kismet Beams
commanders.skillDescription: This skill has a chance to deal 2x damage to the enemy and 30% Scattering damage to all enemy fleets.

commanders.name: Leech Lurkers
commanders.skillDescription: Reduces the chance of being hit and increases Attack Power by 15% for one round. Additional chance to reduce the Durability, Structures and Shields of enemies within 2 steps by 5% each turn.

commanders.name: Light & Darkness
commanders.skillDescription: This skill increases the Shield and Structure values of friendly fleets within 4 steps by 8% after each round and has a chance to reduce enemy Durability, structures, and Shields within 2 steps by 5% after every turn.

commanders.name: Lurking Light
commanders.skillDescription: Has a chance to dodge attacks, increase Attack Power by 15% for one round, and increase Shield and Structure values of friendly forces within 4 spaces by 8% at end of the round.

commanders.name: Rays of Destiny
commanders.skillDescription: This skill has a chance to deal an additional 30% Scattering damage to all enemy forces and reflect all absorbed damage to its source.

commanders.name: The Ravagers
commanders.skillDescription: If all ships in a single enemy fleet slot are destroyed by ships in a single fleet slot, Attack Power of those ships will double. This buff can be stacked up to 8 times. There is also a chance that those ships will instantly reload all weapons.

commanders.name: Suicidal Sirens
commanders.skillDescription: Chance to deal 3x damage and instantly reload weapons, but also reflects 10% damage to attacking ship.

commanders.name: Tactical Wizards
commanders.skillDescription: Chance to avoid damage and increase enemy He3 costs by up to 5 times.

commanders.name: The Twin Torpedoes
commanders.skillDescription: This skill increases the critical strike rate of the commanded fleet and the chance of attacking the target twice.

commanders.name: Wildfire
commanders.skillDescription: Chance to deal 30% Scattering damage to enemy ships and instantly reload weapons.

commanders.name: Winter Knights
commanders.skillDescription: Each time level up, the total increment of four attributes is increased by an additional 5 points.
